items.html: These are the two lower thirds of the Tifferet and the whole of NHY [Netzach-Hod-Yesod], complete. And this is the manner of their division in her: her right line is the three joints in the Netzach of ZA [Zeir Anpin], and it becomes in her HChN [Hochma-Hesed-Netzach] of her right line. From the three joints of the Hod of ZA her left line is made, which are the Bina, Gevura, and Hod in her. From the Tifferet, in the middle line, her Keter is made, out of the two lower thirds, as mentioned. And from the Yesod of ZA is made all the rest of her middle line, which are the Daat and TYM [Tifferet-Yesod-Malchut] in her, as all this will be written, God willing.
